title: Reflavored UI
description: Refreshing Minecraft's UI while staying close to Vanilla colors and style.
body:
#  Reflavored UI
Reflavored UI is a pack that refreshes the Minecraft UI while staying close to vanilla colors and style. It gives the UI a cleaner, more modern look.

### Supported Versions:
- ✅️ **1.21.2 - 26.2**: Full support
- ⚠️ **1.20.2 - 1.21.1**: Mostly works, some minor things like the tooltip and hover overlay will not work

### Supported Mods:
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)

---

![A preview of the buttons, inventory, and hotbar.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef637c48f240fbf9170b3a5ed140c8e129de61f1.png)
